response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of early-career C++/C exposure at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a brief C++ usage on a bachelor thesis. The role demands 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, which is absent. No SQL Server/Oracle experience, no Fixed Income or Investment Banking/Capital Markets domain background. Strengths are in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not aligned with this role.
strengths: Solid senior-level engineering background with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
Strong communication skills evidenced by public talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: Lacks 5-10 years of professional C++ experience on Windows (only ~6 months C/C++ exposure)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
